author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added BufferDescriptor<'a> repr(C) struct aggregating every layout field (data ptr, ndim, shape, strides_bytes, dtype, itemsize, c_contig, f_contig) in a PEP 3118-shaped record.

Added default buffer_descriptor() method on AsRawBuffer composing the existing trait methods. Array/ArrayView/ArcArray inherit it.

Lifetime ties the shape slice to the source array.

2 tests: field aggregation on 2x3 f64 (verifies strides_bytes [24, 8] and pointer match) and repr_c spot-check.

ferray-core: 621 -> 623 lib tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 524af502.
